vibe: Educational, mobile-first, soft 3D/claymorphism, friendly, colorful cartoon UI

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Chunky, mobile-first, highly tappable areas. Generous padding to prevent accidental misclicks by children.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.15)] active:shadow-[0_0px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.15)] active:translate-y-2 transition-all duration-150 border-2 border-white/20 font-bold text-xl
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: rounded-3xl shadow-xl border-4 border-white bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md overflow-hidden
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: rounded-2xl border-4 border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-2xl p-6 focus:border-[#38BDF8] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#38BDF8]/20 transition-all
surfaces_and_micro_themes.map_nodes: w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-[0_6px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] flex items-center justify-center text-3xl font-bold

motion_and_interactions.success_feedback: react-confetti trigger, audio chime, and bounce animation on the correct item

tts_button.description: Large circular button with a speaker icon. Pulses when audio is playing. Must use Browser Web Speech API with female voice (prefer 'Google UK English Female' or similar).
tts_button.style: bg-[#FDE047] text-slate-800 rounded-full w-16 h-16 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#CA8A04]

jolly_phonics_block.description: Individual letter blocks that break down a word (e.g., C - O - M - P - U - T - E - R). Each block is tappable to hear its phonetic sound.
jolly_phonics_block.style: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-xl w-14 h-16 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-bold shadow-sm

animated_teacher.description: A floating mascot at the bottom-left or top-right of the screen that gives instructions. Uses a speech bubble.
animated_teacher.style: w-24 h-24 or purely CSS emoji/SVG based if image unavailable. Speech bubble: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-lg text-lg relative

certificate_generator.description: HTML-to-Canvas or standard canvas implementation to draw the certificate. Must include 'Computer Champ', Student Name, Class, Stars, and a colorful border. NO LOGOS.
certificate_generator.payment: Requires Razorpay checkout (mocked or test mode) for ₹5 before revealing the download button.

specific_requirements.voice: TTS must be prominent. Every instruction and read-aloud must have a 'repeat' button.
specific_requirements.cpu_rule: CPU MUST always be shown as a Cabinet/Tower. NEVER a brain or chip.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the game layouts to maintain the highly customized 'soft toy' 3D button feel (shadow-[0_8px_0_0_...]).
Rely heavily on 'lucide-react' icons for UI elements (stars, audio, play buttons) sized at least 32px (w-8 h-8).
Implement Web Speech API in a hook (e.g., useTTS) that accepts text and handles play/pause. Ensure it's triggered explicitly by user action to respect browser autoplay policies.
For the level map, build a vertically scrolling layout with SVG dashed lines connecting level nodes. Use absolute positioning inside relative rows.
Jolly Phonics breakdown: Split the current word into an array of characters. When tapped, use TTS to say the letter sound.
Jumble Game: Provide a drag-and-drop or tap-to-swap interface for the 26 provided words.
Implement Razorpay standard script tag injection and use a mock success handler if backend secrets are not provided, allowing kids to download the certificate.
Certificate generation: Create an off-screen HTML div with inline styles, use 'html2canvas' to render it, and trigger a download link.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes per rules.
